ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_code" TEXT /* Short code or abbreviation of the school (e.g., Ross, Darden) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the school */,
  "application_url" TEXT /* URL for the school's application page */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the school's admissions office */,
  "program_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the MBA program */,
  "tuition_fees" TEXT /* Tuition fees for the MBA program */,
  "scholarship_offered" INTEGER /* Whether the school offers scholarships */,
  "program_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the MBA program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school to which the application is submitted */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application round */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for submitting the application */,
  "interview_notification" TEXT /* Date and method of interview notification (e.g., None, By Invitation) */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date of the decision release */,
  "essay_release" TEXT /* Whether the essay prompt has been released */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., Pending, Submitted, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the applicant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the applicant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the applicant */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the applicant */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the applicant */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the applicant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the applicant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the applicant's information was last updated */,
  "gmatscore" INTEGER /* GMAT score of the applicant */,
  "gre_score" INTEGER /* GRE score of the applicant */,
  "work_experience" INTEGER /* Years of work experience of the applicant */,
  "undergrad_gpa" TEXT /* Undergraduate GPA of the applicant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interviews" (
  "interview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interview */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application associated with the interview */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the interview */,
  "interview_method" TEXT /* Method of the interview (e.g., In-person, Video Call) */,
  "interview_status" TEXT /* Status of the interview (e.g., Scheduled, Completed, Canceled) */,
  "interviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the interviewer */,
  "interviewer_email" TEXT /* Email of the interviewer */,
  "interview_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the interview */,
  "interview_score" TEXT /* Score given to the applicant after the interview */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "essays" (
  "essay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each essay */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application associated with the essay */,
  "prompt" TEXT /* Text of the essay prompt */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the essay was submitted */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Word count of the essay */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the essay document */,
  "essay_score" TEXT /* Score given to the essay */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback given to the applicant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("essay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_essays_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., applicant, consultant, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access for the user (e.g., basic, premium, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application related to the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., Deadline Reminder, Interview Notification, Decision Release) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Application Status, Interview Summary, Decision Analysis) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "round_name" TEXT /* Name of the round (e.g., R1, R2) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the round */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the round */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the round */,
  "deadline_extension" INTEGER /* Whether the round deadline has been extended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application associated with the recommendation */,
  "recommender_name" TEXT /* Name of the recommender */,
  "recommender_email" TEXT /* Email of the recommender */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was submitted */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the recommendation document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcripts" (
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcript */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application associated with the transcript */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "transcript_date" TEXT /* Date the transcript was submitted */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the transcript document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)
